description: CompositionRed jasper, round neck top made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves and graphic print on the front.FitRegularWash careHand wash cold using mild detergentWash dark colours seperatelyTurn inside out before washing and dryingDo not bleach, iron or scrub on embroidery & printDo not wring or tumble dryFlat dry in shadeMild ironBe a stunner this summer in this jasper red tee. Wear it to your beach parties and relax, carefree, while the fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. The stylish print on the front makes this top a true piece of art. Team it with jeans or summer shorts and chill out in style!Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
